events.title: US Strikes Iranian-Flagged Tankers in Strait of Hormuz
events.desc: US forces fired on and disabled two Iranian-flagged oil tankers attempting to violate the US blockade of Iran's ports. This action by a US Navy F/A-18 Super Hornet, using precision munitions, has escalated tensions in the Strait of Hormuz amidst ongoing peace deal negotiations.

events.title: US Forces Strike Three Iranian-Flagged Vessels Violating Blockade
events.desc: The US military struck two empty Iranian-flagged oil tankers and disabled a third Iranian-flagged vessel on Wednesday, stating they were attempting to violate the ongoing US blockade. Central Command confirmed all three vessels are no longer transiting to Iran, escalating maritime tensions.

events.title: Israel Strikes Beirut, Targeting Senior Hezbollah Figure
events.desc: Israel conducted its first strike on Beirut since a Hezbollah ceasefire in mid-April, stating it targeted a senior Hezbollah figure in the capital. This action risks reigniting broader conflict in the region.

events.title: US Sanctions 10 Entities for Aiding Iran's Weapons Sector
events.desc: The US Treasury has imposed sanctions on ten individuals and companies, including those in China and Hong Kong, for allegedly assisting Iran's military in acquiring weapons and raw materials for Shahed drones. This action occurs shortly before President Trump's visit to China.

events.title: Russia Urges Support for US-Iran Talks to Prevent Hostilities
events.desc: Russian Foreign Minister Sergei Lavrov emphasized the necessity of supporting ongoing negotiations between the US and Iran to prevent a resurgence of hostilities in the Middle East. Russia stated it does not wish to jeopardize stabilization prospects by resuming conflict.

events.title: US Revises UN Resolution on Iran Amid Expected Vetoes
events.desc: Washington has amended its proposed UN resolution demanding Iran cease attacks and mining in the Strait of Hormuz. However, diplomats anticipate that China and Russia will still veto the resolution, posing a diplomatic challenge ahead of President Trump's visit to China.

events.title: US Expects Iran's Reply to Peace Proposal; Clashes Reported in Hormuz
events.desc: US President Donald Trump stated he is awaiting Iran's response to his latest proposal to end the Middle East war. Reports also indicate clashes in the Strait of Hormuz, with satellite images showing a potential oil slick near Iran's Kharg Island.

events.title: Israeli Strikes on Southern Lebanon Kill Rescue Worker
events.desc: Israel carried out attacks in southern Lebanon, resulting in the deaths of 31 people, including a rescue worker, according to Lebanon's National News Agency. This follows increased Israeli attacks in the region.

events.title: Libya's Largest Oil Refinery Halts Operations Amidst Fighting
events.desc: Libya's Zawiya oil refinery, the country's largest, has ceased operations as a precautionary measure due to nearby explosions and gunfire. An emergency has been declared in the region.

events.title: US Strikes Iranian Oil Tankers in Strait of Hormuz
events.desc: The Pentagon released video footage depicting US strikes on two Iranian oil tankers in the Strait of Hormuz, an operation that has heightened regional tensions.

events.title: US Fire on Iran Tankers Sparks Retaliatory Attacks
events.desc: A US fighter jet disabled two Iranian-flagged tankers, leading to retaliatory attacks and unsettling a fragile ceasefire. President Trump indicated he is awaiting Tehran's response to his peace proposal.

events.title: Iran Accuses US of 'Reckless Military Adventure'
events.desc: Iran has accused the United States of engaging in a 'reckless military adventure,' stating that US attacks occur whenever a diplomatic solution seems possible. This statement comes amid ongoing efforts to de-escalate the conflict.

events.title: US Pauses Operation to Guide Vessels Through Strait of Hormuz
events.desc: President Trump announced a pause in 'Project Freedom,' an operation to guide vessels through the Strait of Hormuz, citing progress made towards a deal with Iran. The operation had begun on Monday.

events.title: US Strikes on Iranian Flagged Tankers and Fresh Exchanges in the Gulf
events.desc: US strikes on Iranian tankers and new exchanges in the Gulf have escalated tensions as Washington awaits Tehran's response to a peace proposal. The UAE also reported fresh missile and drone attacks.

events.title: Iran Considers US Proposal Amidst Ceasefire Efforts
events.desc: Iran is reportedly considering a US proposal aimed at ending the war, with mediator Pakistan working to convert the current ceasefire into a permanent resolution. President Trump expressed optimism that the war could conclude quickly.
